polygon.style: stroke-width: 0.00; stroke: none; stroke-linecap: butt; fill: #0072B2; fill-opacity: 0.20;
stroke-width: 0.00; stroke: none; stroke-linecap: butt; fill: #D55E00; fill-opacity: 0.20;
stroke-width: 0.00; stroke: none; stroke-linecap: butt; fill: #5F5F5F; fill-opacity: 0.20;

line.style: stroke-width: 0.53; stroke: #0072B2; stroke-opacity: 0.60; stroke-dasharray: 1.00,3.00; stroke-linecap: butt;
stroke-width: 0.53; stroke: #D55E00; stroke-opacity: 0.60; stroke-dasharray: 1.00,3.00; stroke-linecap: butt;
stroke-width: 0.53; stroke: #5F5F5F; stroke-opacity: 0.60; stroke-dasharray: 1.00,3.00; stroke-linecap: butt;

rect.style: stroke-width: 1.07; stroke: #0072B2; stroke-linecap: butt; fill: #0072B2; fill-opacity: 0.20;
stroke-width: 1.07; stroke: #D55E00; stroke-linecap: butt; fill: #D55E00; fill-opacity: 0.20;
stroke-width: 1.07; stroke: #5F5F5F; stroke-linecap: butt; fill: #5F5F5F; fill-opacity: 0.20;
